batch: Batch126 - P0 Local Runtime Closure Hardening
goal: Raise local P0 runtime/build confidence by requiring fresh, strict local evidence before allowing P1 source work.
localP0RequiredEvidence: package.json version is 0.126.0 and Node target remains 24.x
Next/SWC dependencies are present after npm ci
guarded build performs a real next build and records raw_next_build_passed with exit 0
production live HTTP smoke passes after the current build
auth invite runtime smoke passes after the current build
closure report checks evidence freshness and blocks stale artifacts
hosted URL smoke remains a separate public rollout gate
mustNotClaim: production-ready without hosted URL smoke and real-device UX smoke
Node 24 runtime verified if the command was executed on a non-24 local Node runtime
AI/payment/verified-data changes unless code evidence exists

p1TransitionRule.p1SourceWorkAllowed: true only when strict local evidence is clean
p1TransitionRule.publicP1RolloutAllowed: true only when strict local evidence and APP_URL/NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL hosted smoke pass
